data.content: Implementation review approved. Commit 9c664af3 correctly removes all OpenRouter files (openrouter.ts, openrouter-session-runtime.ts, openrouter-agent.ts, and all tests), keychain.ts and its test, and the settings-openrouter-section component. 39 files changed, 4084 deletions, 181 additions for OpenCode CLI integration. Quality gates passed (tsc clean, 0 lint errors, 1855 tests passing, build succeeds). Code is on main and pushed.
